message:
refactor(ft-xbnl0.2.5): strip dual-runtime cfg gates from runtime_compat.rs

Remove all 55 #[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))] Tokio fallback
blocks (669 lines) and 108 #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] guards
from runtime_compat.rs. The asupersync path is now the sole implementation.

- Module header updated: no longer "temporary dual-runtime" — now
  "asupersync runtime surface"
- Orphaned tokio time-control doc comment removed
- Surface contract quarantine emptied (Tokio builder paths gone)
- tokio::select! retained as poll combinator (runtime-independent)
- File shrunk from 7357 to ~6530 lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
